---
name: Feature request
about: A mode, control, format, or workflow you're missing
labels: enhancement
---

**What you're trying to make** (the video/stream/use-case, not the button)

**What's in the way today**

**If it's a new visual mode**: a reference clip or image says more than a
paragraph.

Note: this project stays free and open-source with GitHub as the only
channel — features that need a server, an account, or a store won't fit.
